mapper.sql:
FROM ( SELECT B.* , @ROWNUM:=@ROWNUM+1 as COUNT FROM ( SELECT A.HM_KEYNO , CASE HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C WHEN #{HOMEPAGE_REP} THEN '대표 도메인' WHEN #{HOMEPAGE_ADMIN} THEN '관리자 도메인' ELSE '' END HOMEPAGE_REP , B.MN_NAME , C.SC_CODENM HM_LANG , A.HM_MENU_DEPTH , CASE A.HM_TILES WHEN 'adm' THEN '/dyAdmin/index.do' ELSE CONCAT('/',A.HM_TILES,'/index.do') END HM_TILES , A.HM_SITE_PATH , B.MN_ORDER , A.HM_USE_YN , CASE HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C WHEN #{HOMEPAGE_REP} THEN 1 WHEN #{HOMEPAGE_ADMIN} THEN 0 ELSE MN_ORDER + 1 END HM_ORDER , D.SC_CODENM HM_GROUP_NAME FROM s_home_manager A LEFT JOIN s_menu_manager B ON A.HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C = B.MN_KEYNO LEFT JOIN s_common_code_sub C ON A.HM_LANG = C.SC_CODEVAL01 AND C.SC_MC_IN_C = 'CP' LEFT JOIN s_common_code_sub D ON A.HM_GROUP = D.SC_KEYNO AND D.SC_MC_IN_C = 'BA' WHERE HM_USE_YN != 'D' AND (@ROWNUM:=0)=0 ORDER BY HM_ORDER ) B )AA WHERE 1=1
AND COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND HOMEPAGE_REP LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND HM_GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND MN_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND HM_LANG LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND HM_MENU_DEPTH LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND HM_TILES LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND HM_SITE_PATH LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND MN_ORDER LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND HM_USE_YN LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%')
AND ( COUNT LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR HOMEPAGE_REP LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR HM_GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR MN_NAME LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR HM_LANG LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR HM_MENU_DEPTH LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR HM_TILES LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR HM_SITE_PATH LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR MN_ORDER LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') OR HM_USE_YN LIKE CONCAT( '%',#{item.searchKeyword},'%') )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM s_home_manager H LEFT JOIN s_menu_manager M ON H.HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C = M.MN_KEYNO WHERE HM_USE_YN != 'D' AND HM_KEYNO = #{HM_KEYNO}
SELECT * FROM s_home_manager H LEFT JOIN s_menu_manager M ON H.HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C = M.MN_KEYNO WHERE HM_USE_YN != 'D' AND HM_KEYNO = #{HM_KEYNO}
SELECT * FROM s_home_manager H LEFT JOIN s_menu_manager M ON H.HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C = M.MN_KEYNO WHERE HM_USE_YN != 'D' AND HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C = #{HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C}
mapper.update: UPDATE s_menu_manager SET MN_FORWARD_URL = CONCAT('/',#{HM_TILES},SUBSTRING(MN_FORWARD_URL,LENGTH(CONCAT('/',#{tilesBefore}))+1)) WHERE MN_HOMEDIV_C = #{MN_KEYNO} AND MN_FORWARD_URL LIKE CONCAT('/',#{tilesBefore},'%')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM u_userinfo_authority A LEFT JOIN s_home_authority_manager B ON A.UIA_KEYNO = B.UIA_KEYNO AND B.HM_KEYNO = #{HM_KEYNO} WHERE UIA_DIVISION = 'A'

SELECT C.HAM_DEFAULT_URL FROM s_menu_manager A LEFT JOIN s_home_manager B ON A.MN_KEYNO = B.HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C LEFT JOIN s_home_authority_manager C ON B.HM_KEYNO = C.HM_KEYNO AND C.UIA_KEYNO = #{UIA_KEYNO} WHERE MN_URL = #{URL}
SELECT HM_TILES FROM s_home_manager A, s_menu_manager B WHERE A.HM_MN_HOMEDIV_C = B.MN_KEYNO AND A.HM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.MN_URL = CONCAT('/',#{tiles})
SELECT HM_TILES, HM_SITE_PATH FROM s_home_manager WHERE HM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND HM_MAIN_HOME != 'A'
